U

unlock(long, String) - Method in class server.dao.AuthDAO
Releases the single-login lock for an actor by deleting its active_session row.
unregister(ClientSession, SubscriptionKey) - Method in class server.subscription.SubscriptionRegistry
Reverses a previous SubscriptionRegistry.register(server.net.ClientSession, common.dto.SubscriptionKey).
unregisterAll(ClientSession) - Method in class server.subscription.SubscriptionRegistry
Detaches session from every subscription it currently holds.
unsubscribe() - Method in class client.net.EventBus.Subscription
Detaches the callback this subscription represents.
unsubscribe(SubscriptionKey) - Method in class server.net.ClientSession
Removes a previous subscription.
updateField(int, ParamField, int) - Method in class server.dao.ParkDAO
Writes a new value to a single park parameter column.
updateReschedule(int, String, String, int, int) - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Reschedules a reservation: updates the scheduling fields (date, time, party size) and the recomputed price in the same statement.
updateReservation(int, String, String, int) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Reschedules a PENDING/CONFIRMED reservation (date / optional time / party size).
updateStatus(int, ReservationStatus) - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Updates the lifecycle status of a reservation and stamps status_changed_at = NOW() in the same statement.
upsertContact(long, String, String) - Method in class server.dao.MemberDAO
Find-or-create a visitor by national ID, saving only their contact details.
upsertVisitor(long, String, String, String, boolean) - Method in class server.dao.MemberDAO
Find-or-create the base visitor row for a national ID.
UserLoginController - Class in client.view
Controller for UserLoginView.fxml — the combined connect + sign-in screen that runs at startup and again after logout.
UserLoginController(NetworkService, Session, Runnable) - Constructor for class client.view.UserLoginController
